HOW DO I SIGN UP?

New to TotalFooty? Here’s how it works.

1
Create a free account
Hit SIGN UP on any game or use the button in the top right. It only takes a minute.
2
Top up your balance
TotalFooty is pre-pay. Bank transfer your game fee — it clears within minutes and you’re set for multiple games.
3
Pick your game and sign up
Choose a game below, click it, select your position and hit SIGN UP. You’re confirmed instantly.

📋 LINEUP BUILDER
